Slovenija

Redirected from Slovenia.

Slovenija is a country in Central Europe with a short Adriatic coastline, alpine mountains, and a dense network of rivers and valleys.

It borders Italy, Austria, Hungary, and Croatia, and its capital and largest city is Ljubljana.

History

Modern Slovenia emerged from the former Yugoslavia and joined the European Union in 2004.

Geography

The country is known for the Julian Alps, karst landscapes, and the Postojna cave system.

Retrieved from Example Wiki
